prompt.content: Compare Sweetmarch Build Partners' (“SBP”) v2 in-house delay and damages assessment to the independent damages report that SBP hired an expert to produce. Create a new spreadsheet that lists the financial damages discrepancies between the two versions. For the category with the largest discrepancy only, provide in a "notes" column relevant facts from the file as to why the two versions differ.
